steps.t: Grooming brushes and apples are in crates at the back of the city stables. You will need both items in order to help Loborís with the horses.
The horses that require attention can be found around the city stables. Loborís has asked you to groom or give treats to several of them.
Loborís is working near the front doors in the city stables. She will want to hear that you've taken care of the horses.
